/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.4.0 -Wno-parentheses -O3 -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/scheme-switching-serial.dir/examples/scheme-switching-serial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheme-switching-serial.dir/unittest/utils/schemeswitching-data-serializer.cpp.o -o ../../bin/examples/pke/scheme-switching-serial   -L/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib:/home/CONNECT/xmeng027/work/HKS-Accelerator-hanxu/openfhe/bulid/lib ../../lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.4.0 ../../lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.4.0 -fopenmp -ldl ../../lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.4.0 /opt/xilinx/xrt/lib/libxrt_coreutil.so -luuid -lpthread -fopenmp -ldl
